allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Implement password reset email notifications

- Add EmailNotificationService to AuthService for sending emails
- Send password reset email with reset link when user requests reset
- Send confirmation email after successful password reset
- Improve reset logic to search across all tenants by email
- Remove hardcoded tenant ID from password reset flow

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: Remove TODO in BenefitManagementService

- Replace TODO comment with clarification that Provider entity is not implemented
- BenefitPlanEnhanced should be used for plans requiring provider details

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add Twilio SMS notification integration with mock mode

- Add TwilioConfig for SMS configuration with mock mode support
- Create SmsNotificationService with Twilio SDK integration
- Add SmsNotificationController with single/bulk SMS endpoints
- Create SMS DTOs \(SmsNotificationRequest, SmsNotificationResponse, BulkSmsRequest\)
- Integrate SmsNotificationService with MultiChannelNotificationService
- Add Twilio SDK dependency to pom.xml
- Add Twilio configuration to application.yml

Mock mode enabled by default - set TWILIO_MOCK_MODE=false with
valid credentials to send real SMS.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(# Stop all servers pkill -f ""spring-boot:run"" pkill -f ""next dev"" pkill -f ""node.*3001"" pkill -f ""node.*3000"" sleep 2 # Verify ports are free echo ""Checking ports..."" lsof -i :8080)

Bash(# Start backend cd /Users/fayaz/IdeaProjects/nulogic/nu-aura/hrms-backend JAVA_HOME=""/Users/fayaz/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/corretto-17.0.15/Contents/Home"" /opt/homebrew/bin/mvn spring-boot:run 2>&1 & # Start frontend cd /Users/fayaz/IdeaProjects/nulogic/nu-aura/hrms-frontend npm run dev 2>&1 & echo ""Starting servers... waiting 30 seconds"" sleep 30 # Check status echo """" echo ""=== Backend \(port 8080\) ==="" curl -s http://localhost:8080/actuator/health || echo ""Not ready yet"" echo """" echo ""=== Frontend \(port 3000\) ==="" curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""HTTP Status: %{http_code}\\n"" http://localhost:3000 echo """" echo ""=== Processes ==="" lsof -i :8080)
Bash(# Check if PostgreSQL is running pg_isready && echo ""PostgreSQL is running"" || echo ""PostgreSQL is not running"" # Check if database exists psql -l)

Bash(# Create database /opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@16/16.11/bin/createdb hrms_dev || echo ""Database may already exist or error"" # List databases to verify /opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@16/16.11/bin/psql -l)
Bash(# Check for duplicate cloudbuild.yaml files find . -name ""cloudbuild.yaml"" -type f)
